channel.title: NEXURADATA — Data recovery services
channel.description: Data recovery and digital forensics services in Montréal

item.g:title: Deleted file recovery — Montréal
item.g:description: Accidental deletion, emptied recycle bin or missing folder. Targeted recovery with no apparent physical damage. Initial assessment at no charge.

item.g:title: External drive, USB and memory card recovery — Montréal
item.g:description: Storage media still detected or partially readable, unstable access, recovery of photos, videos and common documents. Initial assessment at no charge.

item.g:title: Phone and mobile recovery — Montréal
item.g:description: Photos, videos, messages or files on a mobile device. Cases that do not require board-level micro-soldering. Initial assessment at no charge.

item.g:title: Hard drive and SSD recovery — Montréal
item.g:description: Inaccessible drive or SSD, damaged logical structure, specialised work without confirmed heavy mechanical repair. Initial assessment at no charge.
item.g:product_type: Services > Data recovery > Hard drive and SSD

item.g:title: RAID, NAS and server recovery — Montréal
item.g:description: RAID arrays, NAS units and servers. Pricing depends on disk count, failure type, urgency and prior recovery attempts. Initial assessment at no charge.
item.g:product_type: Services > Data recovery > RAID and server

item.g:title: Digital forensics — Montréal
item.g:description: Preservation, incident analysis, chronological documentation and handling of sensitive matters. For HR, legal, insurance and cybersecurity contexts.
